zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth於大約1617年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。她於1634年與Humphrey Griffin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1683年7月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于大约1617年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。她于1634年与Humphrey Griffin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1683年7月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born about 1617, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Humphrey Griffin in 1634, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 July 1683, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth est née environ 1617, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Humphrey Griffin en 1634, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1683, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth è nata il circa 1617 nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Humphrey Griffin nel 1634, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1683, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは約1617年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた。1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでHumphrey Griffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1683年7月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 대략 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1634년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Humphrey Griffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 7월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu aproximadamente 1617, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Griffin em 1634, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de julho de 1683, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась около 1617 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Griffin в 1634 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 июля 1683 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nació aproximadamente 1617, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Humphrey Griffin en 1634, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de julio de 1683, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años.
